title: lithospermum viridiflorum
intro: Lithospermum viridiflorum, also known as glandular lithospermum or green-flowered lithospermum, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Lithospermum viridiflorum include its ability to support the immune system and reduce stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Lithospermum viridiflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
